title: Uday Varmora - DevOps Engineer Resume
summary: DevOps Engineer with **1+ year** owning **CI/CD pipelines**, scaling **distributed applications** on **Kubernetes (EKS)**, and automating cloud infrastructure on **AWS**. Delivered **40+ pipelines** cutting release cycles by **82%**, provisioned **Terraform IaC** (80% faster, 95% drift reduction), and sustained **99.9% uptime** across multi-AZ clusters. Hands-on with **Elasticsearch (ELK), Fluentd, Prometheus, Grafana** for centralized logging and monitoring, **Ingress-NGINX, DNS, Load Balancers** for networking, and **database backups** for production db clusters.
skills: Docker, Kubernetes (EKS, OpenShift), Helm, Karpenter, KEDA, Ingress-NGINX
Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, AWS CodePipeline, AWS CodeBuild, ArgoCD
Terraform (34 modules, S3 remote state, DynamoDB locking), AWS CloudFormation, AWS SAM, Ansible
AWS — EKS, EC2, Lambda, S3, ECR, RDS (PostgreSQL), VPC, CloudWatch
Ingress-NGINX, DNS, Load Balancers, Firewalls, VPC, TLS/SSL, CloudFront
Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Elasticsearch (ELK), Fluentd, Datadog, CloudWatch
Python, Bash/Shell, Linux (Ubuntu, Amazon Linux, RHEL), System Administration
HashiCorp Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, Sealed Secrets, Trivy Operator, IAM, KMS

bullets: Designed and maintained **40+ CI/CD pipelines** using **Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, AWS CodePipeline, and AWS CodeBuild** — automating build-test-deploy workflows across **20+ Dockerised microservices**, cutting release cycles by **82% (45 min → under 8 min)** with zero manual intervention.

Owned and scaled **multi-AZ Kubernetes (EKS)** clusters supporting **distributed applications**; configured **networking fundamentals** including **DNS, Load Balancers, and Firewalls** alongside **Ingress-NGINX Controller** — sustaining **99.9% uptime** via Karpenter node autoscaling and KEDA event-driven scaling for **scaling microservices**.

Provisioned multi-environment AWS infrastructure on **Linux (Ubuntu, Amazon Linux, RHEL)** using **Terraform IaC** (34 reusable modules, S3 remote state, DynamoDB locking) — reducing provisioning time by **80%** and configuration drift by **95%** across Dev, Staging, and Production environments.

Managed **database backups** and cloud infrastructure operations utilising **AWS Backup** and **Velero** to protect **db clusters** and production workloads; achieved **RPO < 1 hour** for cross-region disaster recovery with S3/ECR replication.

Configured **centralised logging and monitoring** using **Grafana, Loki, Elasticsearch (ELK), and Fluentd** for production troubleshooting across distributed applications; developed **Python and Bash** automation to eliminate **~70% of recurring toil** in cluster operations and log triage.

Built AWS infrastructure monitoring on **Linux** environments, triaged production incidents, and authored operational runbooks; wrote **Python and Bash** automation scripts — earning **full-time promotion within 5 months**.

projects.title: Cloud-Native SaaS CRM Platform — Multi-Tenant AWS / EKS Build & Deploy Infrastructure
projects.tech: Terraform · AWS EKS · Docker · Jenkins · GitLab CI/CD · GitHub Actions · AWS CodePipeline · ArgoCD · Ingress-NGINX · Prometheus · Grafana · Loki · Elasticsearch
bullets: Designed multi-environment build/deploy architecture with per-environment **VPC isolation and S3/DynamoDB remote state** — enabling reproducible Dev/Production infrastructure on Linux-based EKS nodes with **Ingress-NGINX Controller**; executed zero-downtime **EKS cluster upgrade (v1.33 → v1.34)** managing node group rollouts, add-on compatibility, and API deprecation remediation.

Reduced compute costs by **30% ($500+/month)** via Karpenter Spot/On-Demand diversification and KEDA off-hours scale-down; set up **Prometheus, Grafana, and Loki** monitoring stack for cluster-wide observability and alerting.

projects.title: Serverless Backend — Multi-Tenant Salon Management SaaS
projects.tech: AWS Lambda · SAM · CloudFormation · API Gateway · RDS PostgreSQL · Amazon EFS · Secrets Manager · Python
bullets: Architected a serverless build/deploy system using **6 nested SAM/CloudFormation templates** with SAM build pipelines — enabling independent deployment of **30+ Python Lambda functions** with per-function least-privilege IAM; engineered an **EFS-mounted dependency layer** cutting build times by **60%+**.

projects.title: Healthcare Management System — Cloud Infrastructure & CI/CD
projects.tech: AWS S3 · CloudFront · App Runner · ECR · Docker · GitHub Actions · Secrets Manager · IAM
bullets: Engineered split-hosting (S3/CloudFront frontend, Dockerised App Runner backend) with a **dual-registry GHCR/ECR strategy** — enabling zero-downtime redeployments and **~30% reduced image pull latency** while serving 500+ concurrent users; automated release workflow via **GitHub Actions** with least-privilege IAM scoping.
